issues.criterion: Bundle completeness — nl--algemene-voorwaarden-kliniekzoeker missing from pages/
issues.details: manifest.json lists 14 pages including nl--algemene-voorwaarden-kliniekzoeker (httpStatus:200, archetype:informational). The bundle README.md claims '14 Full captures' with '0 Failed'. However, source-bundle/pages/ contains only 13 entries — pages/nl--algemene-voorwaarden-kliniekzoeker/ does NOT exist. Live Playwright verification confirmed the page is fully accessible with 12719 body chars and title 'General Terms and Conditions Clinic Finder | Juvéderm® Netherlands'. No bundle HTML, meta.json, desktop.png, or mobile.png for this page. README is inaccurate.
issues.remediation: Re-crawl https://www.juvederm.nl/nl/algemene-voorwaarden-kliniekzoeker and add index.html, meta.json, desktop.png and mobile.png to source-bundle/pages/nl--algemene-voorwaarden-kliniekzoeker/. Update README to reflect actual capture count.

issues.details: The orchestrator post-Phase 2a notes require verification of .eds-migration/state/sample-scrape.json (to be written by the Analyzer). This file does not exist. Cannot verify archetype sampleUrl alignment, content pattern cataloguing, or AEM component class inventory against it.
issues.remediation: The Analyzer must write sample-scrape.json before Phase 2a verification can be completed. Each archetype's sampleUrl should have a corresponding entry with HTML and extracted patterns.

issues.criterion: Visual similarity — consent gate visible in independent live renders
issues.details: pHash comparison between bundle screenshots and fresh Playwright captures yielded low similarity scores: nl desktop=0.469, nl--treatment--lips desktop=0.469, nl--qa desktop=0.562. Investigation shows this is because the bundle dismissed consent/OneTrust overlays correctly (bundle HTML has 9567+ visible chars) while live renders captured behind the gate (main.innerText=210 chars for homepage). This confirms the bundle captured richer post-gate content, but it makes direct screenshot-to-screenshot visual comparison unreliable as a fidelity signal.
issues.remediation: When verifiers re-run spot-checks, they must apply the same overlay-dismissal selectors documented in source-bundle/README.md (OneTrust, Cookiebot, Abbvie banner) and allow additional settle time post-dismissal before comparing.

evidence.finding: 14 pages present (exceeds ≥10 minimum). Archetypes: homepage(2), treatment-page(5), faq(1), clinic-finder(3), legal(1), contact(1), informational(1). All URLs under www.juvederm.nl. No suspicious infinite-pattern URL sequences detected.

evidence.render_strategy: curl HTTP fetch of sitemap.xml — 13 <loc> entries returned
evidence.finding: Sitemap has 13 URLs; manifest has 14. Extra URL (nl--algemene-voorwaarden-kliniekzoeker) was discovered via footer link crawling — not a sitemap entry. All 13 sitemap URLs are present in manifest. No crawl truncation detected.

Header nav links cover treatment-page (Lippen/Ogen/Accentueren/Herstel/Man), faq (Over Juvéderm/Kosten/Langdurige resultaten/Veiligheid/Zones), clinic-finder (Vind je kliniek), homepage. All nav link archetypes are represented in the manifest. Duplication in header nav (27 entries, 14 unique hrefs) is expected — both desktop and mobile menus are captured. footer.links.json has 21 links matching manifest.navigation.footer.

evidence.render_strategy: Playwright Chromium headless, networkidle + main.textLength stable 500ms x2, attempted OneTrust dismissal, viewport 1440x900 desktop / 390x844 mobile
evidence.finding: Live page accessible, title confirmed 'JUVÉDERM Nederlands'. Bundle HTML is 388KB (388730 bytes) with 9567 visible chars. My live render shows body_text=5995 chars (consent gate partially blocking). Low pHash similarity (0.469) is explained by consent gate in live render vs gate-dismissed bundle capture. Bundle desktop.png=2.1MB, mobile.png=945KB — non-trivial sizes confirming full-page renders.

viewports.name: desktop
viewports.note: Low score explained by OneTrust consent gate visible in live capture; bundle captured post-gate dismissal. Content text match (keywords: JUVÉDERM, lippen, behandeling) confirms correct page identity.

viewports.name: mobile
viewports.note: Same consent gate explanation as desktop.

evidence.render_strategy: Playwright Chromium headless, networkidle + main.textLength stable 500ms x2, viewport 1440x900 desktop / 390x844 mobile
evidence.finding: Live page accessible. Title confirmed 'Juvederm en lippen | Juvéderm® Netherlands'. Bundle HTML 347KB with 12685 visible chars. My render: main_text=168 (behind gate), body_text not separately measured. Bundle desktop.png=2.5MB, mobile.png=1MB. pHash similarity 0.469 desktop / 0.438 mobile — explained by consent gate difference.

viewports.name: desktop
viewports.note: Consent gate explains low score; bundle correctly captured post-gate content (12685 visible chars).

evidence.render_strategy: Playwright Chromium headless, networkidle + main.textLength stable 500ms x2, viewport 1440x900 desktop / 390x844 mobile
evidence.finding: Live FAQ page fully rendered. main.innerText=20604 chars live, bundle HTML has 23681 visible chars — comparable, confirming no significant pre-hydration issue. Strongly indicates correct post-hydration capture. Bundle desktop.png=2MB, mobile.png=1.4MB. pHash 0.562 desktop / 0.406 mobile — still affected by consent gate.

viewports.name: desktop
viewports.note: Text length comparison (live 20604 vs bundle 23681) confirms bundle captured post-hydration content correctly. pHash delta due to consent overlay in fresh render.

viewports.name: mobile
viewports.note: Same consent gate explanation; FAQ content verified via text length match.

evidence.render_strategy: Playwright Chromium headless, networkidle + body.innerText stable, viewport 1440x900 desktop / 390x844 mobile
evidence.finding: Page live and accessible: title='General Terms and Conditions Clinic Finder | Juvéderm® Netherlands', body_text=12719 chars, main_text=0 (all content in <section> outside <main>). httpStatus 200. Page IS in manifest but completely absent from source-bundle/pages/ — no index.html, meta.json, or screenshots. README inaccurately claims 14 full captures.

header.html: 40KB with real AEM navigation elements (emu-navigation, aaaem-navigation, emu-button classes present). footer.html: 55KB with real footer elements (footer class, aaaem-container, social links). header.links.json: 27 links. footer.links.json: 21 links. Both match manifest.navigation counts. header-desktop.png: 205KB non-empty. footer-desktop.png: 53KB non-empty. No mobile chrome screenshots — README only promises desktop crops, acceptable.

evidence.render_strategy: regex extraction from static HTML files
evidence.finding: AEM component classes correctly present and catalogued: 82 distinct emu-* classes (top: emu-type, emu-item-title, emu-navigation__item, emu-title, emu-image, emu-button), 13 distinct data-cmp-* attributes (data-cmp-data-layer, data-cmp-hook-image, data-cmp-lazythreshold, data-cmp-clickable, data-cmp-hook-accordion, data-cmp-hook-carousel), 64 distinct aaaem-* classes (aaaem-container, aaaem-carousel, aaaem-accordion, aaaem-tabs, aaaem-teaser). Key component types present: accordion (aaaem-accordion, data-cmp-hook-accordion), carousel (aaaem-carousel, data-cmp-hook-carousel), navigation, teaser, image, button — fully covering the expected AEM component vocabulary.

README fully documents render strategy: Playwright Chromium headless, networkidle waitUntil, 15+ overlay selectors (OneTrust, Cookiebot, Abbvie consent banner), content-stability loop polling main.innerText every 500ms x2 identical readings (up to 12s), Escape fallback, desktop 1440×900, mobile 390×844. Site-specific quirks documented (apex 503, SSL, OneTrust). Strategy is complete and reproducible.

sample-scrape.json does not exist at .eds-migration/state/sample-scrape.json. This is a Phase 2a Analyzer artifact. Cannot verify archetype sampleUrl alignment or content pattern cataloguing against it. AEM component classes (emu-*, data-cmp-*, aaaem-*) were verified independently from bundle HTML — 82 emu-* classes, 13 data-cmp-* attrs, 64 aaaem-* classes confirmed present. Informational page (algemene-voorwaarden-kliniekzoeker) is fully accessible live with 12719 body chars.

summary: FAIL — 13/14 manifest pages captured in bundle (nl--algemene-voorwaarden-kliniekzoeker missing despite README claiming 14 full captures); sample-scrape.json absent; all 3 spot-checked live URLs return real content; chrome header/footer non-empty with 27/21 links; render strategy fully documented; AEM component classes (82 emu-*, 13 data-cmp-*, 64 aaaem-*) confirmed in bundle HTML; pHash similarity low (0.47-0.56) explained by consent gate in fresh renders vs crawler gate-dismissed captures.
